package_title: I will produce faceless YouTube/TikTok automation videos
description:
🔧 I will produce faceless YouTube/TikTok automation videos

I deliver a packaged faceless video (script + voice + visuals) you can post daily using Edge-TTS + Remotion + your youtube-content skill — all free/self-hosted.

✅ What you get:
• Done-for-you setup — no technical skills needed
• Free, open-source tools (you own it, no SaaS lock-in)
• Charge $50-$300/video; recurring content-retainer model
• 7-day support after delivery

📦 Packages:
• Basic ($30, 3 days, 1 rev): 1 video, 1 workflow, Email support
• Standard ($120, 5 days, 2 rev): Up to 5 videos, Setup + test, Loom walkthrough, 7-day support
• Premium ($240, 7 days, 3 rev): Unlimited videos, Full system, Monthly retainer option, Priority support

🚀 How it works:
1. You send product URL / script / brand kit
2. I generate & test the video creatives
3. I hand over + a 5-min Loom walkthrough

⚡ Why me: I use the same tools that power a 100-skill autonomous company.
